SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_DateSubmission, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_DateSubmission_time, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_UrlLastAccessed, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_UrlLastAccessedTimie, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_HasDataChanges, CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_CompletedProecssing, CDS_Account.Acct_AccountNo, CDS_Account.Acct_AccountId, CDS_Account.Acct_AccountName, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactNo, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactFirstName, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactLastName, CDS_Account.Acct_ContactEmail, CDS_Account.Acct_DateEmailSent, CDS_Account.Acct_TimeEmailSent, CDS_Account.Acct_UrlIdentifier, CDS_Account.Acct_MbrshipYear FROM dbo.CDS_SubmissionLog, CDS_Account WHERE CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_Year = CDS_Account.Acct_MbrshipYear AND CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_AccountNo = CDS_Account.Acct_AccountNo AND CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_UrlIdentifier = CDS_Account.Acct_UrlIdentifier AND CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_DateSubmission <> '1901-01-01' AND dbo.CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_CompletedProecssing = '' ORDER BY CDS_SubmissionLog.SubLog_DateSubmission DESC
